calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-MEL-CONSUMER re-validation (test-bed redesign of V3-EXQ-718): does accumulated waking MEL drive adaptive sleep cadence, read against MEASURED MEL? (INV-050 third/learning-demand drive; MECH-180). C1 (load-bearing) DV monotone in MEASURED per-arm mean MEL over 4 ecological ON arms; MEL-injection positive-control arm (graded MEL by construction) as same-statistic readiness gate + capability check; OFF-pinned control (C2). DV=cumulative_sws_writes+rem_rollouts
items.machine_affinity_note: prefer cloud (linux-x86_64-py3.10); yield logic + scaler wake cloud workers to claim before DLAPTOP-4.local. No hardware requirement.
items.note: ROUTED FOLLOW-ON from failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-718_2026-07-07 (routing=queue-experiment). experiment_purpose=diagnostic; claim_ids=[INV-050, MECH-180]; PROMOTES NOTHING until it scores. TEST-BED REDESIGN, same scientific question, new letter (718a supersedes 718). WHY: V3-EXQ-718 established the SD-MEL-CONSUMER is LIVE + FUNCTIONAL (offline-phase duration factor tracks waking MEL NONE 0.885/LOW 0.822/MED 1.263/HIGH 1.266; C2 PASS 3/3, ON-HIGH DV>OFF-HIGH DV every seed, OFF pinned cnt_var=0). The FAIL was NOT the consumer: 718's load-bearing C1 tested DV monotonicity vs the graded NOVELTY LABEL, but the CausalGridWorldV2 drift schedule produced NON-monotone waking MEL (factor ordering LOW<NONE<MED~HIGH) -- novelty->MEL is the broken link, not MEL->cadence. REDESIGN: (1) PRIMARY FIX -- drop the novelty-LABEL monotonicity DV; the load-bearing C1 now tests that offline-phase DURATION (DV=cumulative_sws_writes+rem_rollouts, the V3-EXQ-677 pinned DV) is monotone in the MEASURED per-arm mean MEL (4 ecological ON arms sorted by measured mean_mel) with a measured-MEL-gradient non-degeneracy guard, on >=2/3 seeds. Per-arm mean_mel surfaced in arm_results. (2) MEL-INJECTION POSITIVE CONTROL arm (ARM_5_INJECT_PC, capability-not-ecological): warms buffers with stable-base foraging then OVERRIDES the waking-MEL accumulator to a graded per-cycle target (INJECT_LEVELS x base_ref, decoupled from foraging novelty) right before force_cycle -- per-cycle DV must be monotone+spread in the injected level. This is the skill-required SAME-STATISTIC readiness gate (C1 routes on DV-response-to-graded-MEL; the readiness precondition asserts exactly that on a positive control where the gradient is non-degenerate by construction) AND a clean link-(ii) capability check. (3) C2 control kept from 718: OFF arm pinned (cnt_var=0) + ON-HIGH DV>OFF-HIGH DV. NO-WEAKENS self-route: readiness-unmet (convergence OR injection-PC below floor) -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a verdict); readiness-met + C1 + C2 PASS -> mel_drives_adaptive_sleep_cadence (supports; /governance clears INV-050 retest + MECH-180 v3_pending); readiness-met + C2 PASS + C1 FAIL -> mel_consumer_capable_ecological_novelty_not_graded (non_contributory; injection PC proves the consumer responds to graded MEL, so a C1 fail = ecological foraging did not produce graded MEL, a measurement/environment gap, NOT a substrate ceiling, NOT a falsification -> re-grade the novelty drift schedule). RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: INV-050 has >=2 non_contributory autopsies (701/701a/701b/701c) but the named upstream substrate SD-MEL-CONSUMER is BUILT+LANDED (ree-v3 main 909292c; ree_core/sleep/mel_consumer.py; ree-v3/CLAUDE.md IMPLEMENTED 2026-07-07) and DEMONSTRABLY FUNCTIONAL (718 C2 PASS 3/3). 718a is the correct NEXT VALIDATION of a built+functional substrate reading MEASURED MEL -- NOT a same-selector substrate_ceiling re-derive; the 718 autopsy sets re_derive_brake.fired=false, route_to=queue-experiment. MINT: in-run self-mint ON (arm_cell reuse-eligible fingerprints, fresh independent agent per cell). SEPARATE baseline mint SKIPPED -- disqualifier #2 (test-bed genuinely in flux for this lineage: 718->718a is a test-bed redesign per the autopsy; the OFF/base envelope re-tunes per letter, so a mint would correctly refuse). SLEEP DRIVER: manual-cycle-loop (force_cycle once per cycle). Smoke --dry-run PASS 2026-07-07 (3-arm subset NONE_ON/HIGH_OFF/INJECT_PC: no crash, manifest+sentinel written, dry_run-relocated (no evidence leak); MEL consumer LIVE -- OFF pinned cnt_var=0, injection arm mean_mel=1.148e-4 == mean([0.6,0.9,1.2])xref EXACT so the accumulator override flows precisely through force_cycle, inject_pc readiness=1.00; progress instrumentation correct 6x ep N/75 + 3 verdict lines).
